proposals.title: Russian Dictation Support for AI
proposals.what_we_have_now: No native Russian dictation support in some AI applications, particularly Anthropic.
proposals.what_is_new: Integration of Russian dictation capability into the system.
proposals.why_it_matters: Enhances user experience for Russian-speaking users by allowing voice input without keyboard.
rollout_plan: Research existing solutions for Russian dictation
proposals.risk: Potential integration issues with existing models.
proposals.license: Open-source or proprietary, depending on solution.

proposals.title: AI Agent Assembly Platform
proposals.what_we_have_now: No visual constructor for assembling AI agents without programming knowledge.
proposals.what_is_new: Integration of a visual constructor for assembling AI agents.
proposals.why_it_matters: Lowers the barrier to entry for non-technical users to create AI agents.
rollout_plan: Evaluate existing platforms like MWS AI Agents Platform
Develop or integrate a similar tool
proposals.risk: Complexity in ensuring compatibility with existing systems.
proposals.license: Proprietary or open-source, depending on choice.

proposals.title: Human-LLM Co-Planning Framework
proposals.what_we_have_now: Limited transparency and control in multi-agent system planning.
proposals.what_is_new: Implementation of a human-LLM co-planning framework for better control.
proposals.why_it_matters: Improves user ability to manage and understand complex multi-agent plans.
proposals.risk: May require significant changes to current orchestration.

summary_md:
### Intel-Scout Digest 2026-05-25

**Proposals:**
1. **Russian Dictation Support for AI** (🟡 consider) - Add Russian voice input capability, enhancing UX for Russian speakers. [Read more](https://habr.com/ru/articles/1039248/).
2. **AI Agent Assembly Platform** (🟡 consider) - Visual tool for non-technical users to build AI agents. [Read more](https://habr.com/ru/companies/ru_mts/articles/1038936/).
3. **Human-LLM Co-Planning Framework** (🟢 info) - Improve multi-agent plan transparency. [Read more](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23023).

**Summary:**
Today's focus is on expanding capabilities with Russian dictation and visual agent assembly, plus improving planning transparency. All proposals are low-risk and align with gaps in our current stack.
